anomalies.t: NEW CRITICAL: 15 add_comment failures (1 in Contribution Check, 14 in PR Sous Chef #2) — agent emits target="*" but no item_number/issue_number. Both copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6 — points to a shared prompt or library change. Investigate today.

NEW: Smoke Claude CLI completes (terminal_reason=completed) but Execute Claude Code CLI step times out at 10min, 52s after CLI exit. Suggests post-exit buffer drain or wrapper hang. Either bump timeout-minutes or fix the wrapper drain logic.

ESCALATED: $9.90 today is a new daily high, surpassing the original $8.54 peak. Was $6.05 yesterday — +64% in one day. 19.4m / 14.9M tokens / 97 turns. Single workflow = 38% of daily spend. Drill into what changed (prompt? input volume? new code path?).

IMPROVING: down from 3 codex failures yesterday to 1 today. Most codex workflows now use gpt-5.4 and succeed (AI Moderator, Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer, Smoke Codex). Only Changeset Generator still on gpt-5.3-codex, which the CLI routes to gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07 (404 at proxy). One workflow-frontmatter edit away from full resolution.

RECURRED after 1-day quiet: 1 occurrence today (PR Sous Chef #1, run 26475294676). Yesterday I de-escalated this; today's data shows the pattern is intermittent, not resolved. Re-escalate to medium severity. Root cause likely an init race between awf-squid and awf-iptables-init.
RESOLVED: Smoke Antigravity succeeded today (3.4m). parse_antigravity_log.cjs is now bundled — yesterday's recommended fix landed within 24h.

Success rate 85.7% today on 49 runs (lower-volume day). vs 94.7% (174 runs) yesterday, 81.1% (38 runs) 05-24, 41.6% (77 runs) 05-23. Variance partly run-volume-driven. The 6 failures today are spread across 5 distinct workflows (no single failure hotspot like Apr 23's harness bug).

611/3726 = 16.4% blocked. Roughly flat from yesterday's 17.9%. Same composition: most blocks are `(unknown)` (DNS resolution failures, 438) + Google service domains in smoke tests. Non-smoke workflows look healthy.

NEW: Smoke Copilot test #20 failed with empty staging dir for upload_artifact. The smoke prompt either doesn't pre-populate test files or the path resolution changed. Other Smoke workflows (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Pi, Antigravity) all succeed — Copilot smoke is the only one missing the file-create step. Worth a quick prompt review.

Observability surfaced min_turns=0, max_turns=217 today across 4 runs (avg 142.8). Widened from 7-65 yesterday. 0-turn runs are skip-fast exits; 217-turn is the high-tail. 2/4 runs failed (50% rate) — but failure causes were unrelated (awf-squid infra + add_comment target=*) so the high variance itself isn't directly causing failures.

Top 3 today: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $9.90 (NEW HIGH), Daily Code Metrics $4.06, Smoke Claude $3.20. Together = $17.16 of $26.37 (65%). Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer now dominates spend more than ever.
31 copilot runs today; no harness ENOENT, no anthropic-beta header errors. CLI 1.0.52 holds stable across 3 audit cycles.
